stamp: Approved — STOP-01 resolved: reject the addition
recordTitle: Implementation session: tag filtering, STOP-01 resolved
summary: STOP-01 was resolved by rejecting the mid-session remote tag-suggestion request, and the resolution was explicitly accepted in chat. Three of five slices were green at the pause; the approved plan resumes with Slices 4 and 5. The remote-API idea is preserved as an unresolved item, not built. No production behavior was changed by this record.
acceptedVia: explicit chat confirmation after candidate export

decisions.rationale: The remote tag-suggestion API contradicts an approved non-goal; widening scope mid-build would bypass the change-blueprint gates. Keep the approved 5-slice plan and log the idea as unresolved.
decisions.acceptedVia: chat: "reject the remote API, continue the plan" after reviewing the candidate export

exampleWorking.rationale: The remote tag-suggestion API contradicts an approved non-goal; widening scope mid-build would bypass the change-blueprint gates. Keep the approved 5-slice plan and log the idea as unresolved.

canonicalBody: STOP-01 resolved: the remote tag-suggestion API is rejected as out of the approved scope, and the approved five-slice plan continues from Slice 4. The deviation about unknown-tag URL fallback remains open and must be answered before Slice 4 renders. Slices 1-3 (pure filterByTag, pure parseTagFromSearch, static markup) were green at the pause; twelve node --test assertions passed and typecheck was clean. This record reflects the accepted resolution only; the live board that carried the open gate is now stale.
